prompt_text:
### Demographics: 63-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 3 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: Postprandial fatigue and thirst noted; no DKA/HHS signs; no recent hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 4 (15-29)
Heart failure: HFimpEF (NYHA Class II)
ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of CABG); Peripheral artery disease
Fibrosis
Body mass index category: Normal
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 4 (15-29); HF: HFimpEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of CABG); MASLD: Fibrosis; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 1-2 drinks/month

### Medication information
- Current medications: Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 69.3 kg; Height 183.4 cm; BMI 20.6 kg/m²; Blood pressure 130/74 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.9%; 9 months ago 8.3%; 6 months ago 7.8%; 3 months ago 7.3%; current 6.7%), FPG (12 months ago 248mg/dL; 9 months ago 228mg/dL; 6 months ago 179mg/dL; 3 months ago 154mg/dL; current 173mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 68.3kg; 9 months ago 66.3kg; 6 months ago 65.9kg; 3 months ago 60.9kg; current 69.3kg), Height (12 months ago 183.4cm; 9 months ago 183.4cm; 6 months ago 183.4cm; 3 months ago 183.4cm; current 183.4cm), BMI (12 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 18.0kg/m²; current 20.6kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 135mmHg; 9 months ago 134mmHg; 6 months ago 135mmHg; 3 months ago 130mmHg; current 130mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 74mmHg; 9 months ago 73mmHg; 6 months ago 74mmHg; 3 months ago 73mmHg; current 74mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 63U/L; 9 months ago 56U/L; 6 months ago 63U/L; 3 months ago 63U/L; current 58U/L), AST (12 months ago 127U/L; 9 months ago 127U/L; 6 months ago 119U/L; 3 months ago 128U/L; current 120U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.7mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.7mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.6mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.6mg/dL; current 1.6mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 20mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 19mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 19mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 21mL/min/1.73m²; current 18mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 290mg/g; 9 months ago 203mg/g; 6 months ago 196mg/g; 3 months ago 271mg/g; current 273mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 77mg/dL; 9 months ago 77mg/dL; 6 months ago 79mg/dL; 3 months ago 72mg/dL; current 75mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 58mg/dL; 9 months ago 58mg/dL; 6 months ago 58mg/dL; 3 months ago 56mg/dL; current 57mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 97mg/dL; 9 months ago 94mg/dL; 6 months ago 95mg/dL; 3 months ago 96mg/dL; current 103mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 11.2g/dL; 6 months ago 11.9g/dL; 3 months ago 11.2g/dL; current 11.1g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 0.47 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
